vehicleAdmin.title: Vehicle management
vehicleAdmin.subtitle: Register company vehicles and review the fleet available in the system.
vehicleAdmin.createDescription: Complete the vehicle basic details. It will then be available for visit assignment.
vehicleAdmin.fleetSubtitle: List of existing vehicles to validate recent creations.
vehicleAdmin.errorMessage: The vehicle could not be created.
vehicleAdmin.loadError: The registered fleet could not be loaded.
vehicleAdmin.emptyFleet: There are no vehicles registered yet.
vehicleAdmin.availabilityHint: Vehicles in Available status may appear in the visit scheduling selector.
